title: Atlas Manifest
description: Inventory of projects discovered by map-project. The shared input to detect-connections and every downstream skill.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this manifest was produced.

roots.description: The scan locations this manifest covers. One monorepo root, or several repo roots.

path.description: Absolute path to the scanned root.

kind.description: How projects were enumerated under this root. 'single' = one project at the root; 'explicit' = the path was supplied directly as a project.

id.description: Stable, unique slug. Used as the edge endpoint in graph.json and the note filename in the vault. Derive from packageName or the directory name; keep it stable across runs.

root.description: Absolute path to this project's root directory.

kind.description: Coarse role. app/website/mobile = user-facing; service/function = backend; lib = shared package; tool = CLI/script.

packageName.description: The published/import name if any (e.g. '@scope/ui'). Used to resolve shared-import edges across project boundaries.

tags.description: Free-form grouping labels (domain, team, bounded context). Drives optional domain subgraphs and per-domain canvases.

aliases.description: Other names this project is known by — service-discovery name, container/host name, env-var token, queue-subject prefix. Connection resolution matches against these.

ports.description: Ports this project listens on, when known. Helps resolve URL/port-based edges.

metadata.description: Free-form extra detail; not interpreted by downstream skills.
